items.briefing:
Australian organisations are facing a busy cyber threat period. Experts are flagging a rise in third-party supplier risks, where attackers target your vendors to reach you. Separately, Australians are being warned that major life events — such as buying a home, having a baby, or retiring — are prime targets for scammers. End-of-financial-year pressures are also increasing risk, as staff under pressure may click links or approve payments without proper checks.

A new study also found many Australian office workers are using AI tools in ways that break their organisation's policies, often without realising it. **Tip:** Check what AI tools your team is using day-to-day and remind them to keep sensitive work information out of unapproved platforms.

featured.title: Australians face scam risk during major life events
featured.quote: Australians are vulnerable to scams during major life events when stress impairs judgment.
